flavor_text: A barracks blade still rough along the edge.
prompt_item_description: A crude iron shortsword with uneven edge geometry and visible hammer scars. Straight stubby guard and coarse leather grip. Issued to fresh recruits, entirely mundane.

flavor_text: Forged thin and cheap for hands that still tremble.
prompt_item_description: A thin, cheaply forged sword with narrow profile and light weight. Minimal guard, plain wooden grip core under worn leather. Built for inexperienced hands, no enchantment.

flavor_text: A woodsman's split iron turned toward flesh.
prompt_item_description: A practical woodsman’s axe converted for combat. Broad iron head with tool-like grind, solid ash haft, iron wedge fitting. Functional and unadorned.

flavor_text: Mud-stained steel that has only tasted petty duels.
prompt_item_description: A mud-stained steel blade with matte grey finish and shallow fuller. Guard slightly bent from use. Leather grip darkened by damp conditions. Plain but seasoned.

flavor_text: Reliable weight for those not yet tested by ruin.
prompt_item_description: A balanced steel longsword with clean central fuller and reinforced tang. No decoration beyond a stamped maker’s mark. Dependable battlefield steel.

flavor_text: A provincial edge that holds against common mail.
prompt_item_description: A modest arming sword with slightly elongated proportions. Edge well maintained, grip rewrapped in fresh leather. Suggests a soldier beginning to distinguish himself.

flavor_text: Its hooked beard drags shields from uncertain guards.
prompt_item_description: A heavy bearded war axe with extended lower hook for shield catching. Steel head thick and practical, haft reinforced with iron bands. No magical traits.

flavor_text: Carved with faded sigils from border skirmishes.
prompt_item_description: A curved sabre with faint reddish tint along the fuller. Slim guard and tight leather wrap. Blade feels quick and responsive, entirely mundane.

flavor_text: Tempered in ash pits where veteran ranks are named.
prompt_item_description: A longblade of tempered steel with defined fuller lines and improved balance. Guard fitted cleanly, pommel weighted properly. Skilled craftsmanship, no enchantment.

flavor_text: Cold iron that bites deeper after the first blood.
prompt_item_description: A cold-toned axe with pale steel edge and thicker spine. Head slightly elongated, grip reinforced near the base. Mundane construction but refined balance.

flavor_text: Layered metal whispering of patient and practiced kills.
prompt_item_description: A patterned steel sword showing subtle layered grain in the metal. Clean guard geometry and improved symmetry. Clearly forged by an experienced smith.

flavor_text: A grim standard among wardens of besieged keeps.
prompt_item_description: A broad-bladed axe with strong chopping profile and carefully shaped cutting edge. Reinforced socket and polished bit. Practical but well made.

flavor_text: Balanced for tourneys yet hardened by real sieges.
prompt_item_description: A long steel blade with deep fuller and darker matte finish. Grip wrapped in dyed leather. Hints of refinement without ornament.

flavor_text: Each notch in its head marks a broken line of men.
prompt_item_description: A heavy war sword with reinforced spine and slightly widened guard. Metal well balanced and durable. Built for prolonged conflict.

flavor_text: Heavy steel sworn to mountain oaths and old banners.
prompt_item_description: A broad greatblade with extended two-handed grip. Steel is brighter and more consistent, edges precisely ground. Impressive but still mundane.

flavor_text: Smoked black by peat fires and night executions.
prompt_item_description: A darkened blade with subtle internal line etchings near the hilt. Steel layered and hardened. A faint rune rests close to the guard, barely luminous.

flavor_text: Noble trim over a core built for ruthless work.
prompt_item_description: A reinforced battle axe with angular profile and fitted counterweight pommel. Engraved edge markings, faint residual enchantment woven into the steel.

flavor_text: Its crescent edge howls through plate at full swing.
prompt_item_description: A large two-handed sword with clean fuller channels and structured guard. Rune lines follow the blade spine, emitting a soft steady glow.

flavor_text: A watchtower relic that cleaves as if judgment were law.
prompt_item_description: A massive cleaving sword with elongated proportions and controlled arcane veins beneath the metal surface. Glow remains subtle and contained.

flavor_text: Storm-battered steel that lands like a falling gate.
prompt_item_description: A refined steel axe with silver-accented fittings and etched head patterns. Faint magical threading stabilizes the edge during heavy swings.

flavor_text: Etched silver lines glow when battle turns against you.
prompt_item_description: A polished longblade with silver-toned guard and elegant fuller lines. Subtle arcane energy embedded within the steel, no external aura.

flavor_text: An executioner's weight that silences armored prayer.
prompt_item_description: A towering greataxe with widened blade cheeks and engraved structural motifs. Faint runic channels pulse dimly along the cutting edge.

flavor_text: Named for kingdoms that vanished under its measure.
prompt_item_description: A grand two-handed greatsword with elongated silhouette and engraved spine ridges. Runic veins glow softly beneath the metal surface.

flavor_text: A throne-breaker carried by oathless champions.
prompt_item_description: A formal war axe bearing a crest engraved into the socket. Steel alloy appears lighter and denser. Arcane lines shimmer faintly near the blade edge.

flavor_text: An empire's final argument bound in star-dark steel.
prompt_item_description: A master-forged imperial warblade with flawless symmetry and sculpted guard. Embedded arcane veins glow steadily within the fuller. A restrained crystal focus rests in the pommel.
